hero.title: Izinhlelo zobunjiniyela ezikhulayo
hero.subtitle: Isoftware yebhizinisi · I-AI ne-Machine Learning · Ingqalasizinda yamafu · I-IoT ne-Edge
hero.description: Kusuka ku-automation ehlakaniphile kuya kumapulatifomu omdabu wefu, sakha futhi silethe ubuchwepheshe obunika amandla amabhizinisi anesifiso - ngesikhathi, ngesabelomali, esikalini.

services.subtitle: Izinsizakalo zethu
services.title: Ubunjiniyela be-Full-Spectrum
services.description: Izindawo eziyisithupha zokuzivocavoca. Iqembu elilodwa. Zonke izingqimba zobuchwepheshe bakho - kusuka kumadivayisi onqenqemeni kuya kumadeshibhodi ebhizinisi.

customSoftware.title: Ukuthuthukiswa kwesoftware yangokwezifiso
customSoftware.description: Izinhlelo zokusebenza zanamuhla ezakhiwe ngama-microservices, ama-API, kanye nokwakhiwa kwefu.

aiMl.title: I-AI, i-ML ne-Business Intelligence
aiMl.description: Amapayipi e-AI / ML, amadeshibhodi we-Power BI, kanye nokuhlaziywa okuthuthukile okuguqula idatha ibe izinqumo.

cloud.title: Ukwakhiwa Kwamafu Nengqalasizinda
cloud.description: Ingqalasizinda yamafu amaningi eneziqukathi, i-serverless, kanye ne-scalability yomhlaba wonke eyakhelwe ngaphakathi.

iot.title: I-IoT ne-Edge Computing
iot.description: Amadivaysi axhunyiwe, amawele edijithali, kanye ne-edge computing ye-Industry 4.0.

devops.title: I-DevOps ne-Platform Engineering
devops.description: Amapayipi e-CI / CD, ingqalasizinda njengekhodi, nokubonwa kusuka ekuzibophezeleni ekukhiqizeni.

digital.title: Ukuguqulwa kwedijithali nokubonisana
digital.description: Isu lezobuchwepheshe, amamephu omgwaqo wesimanje, kanye nokubonisana ngezandla.

cta.title: Yakha okuthile okungathí sina
cta.description: Kusuka ekuthuthukisweni kwesoftware yangokwezifiso kanye nezixazululo ezinikwe amandla yi-AI kuya kwingqalasizinda yamafu kanye ne-automation - siletha izinsizakalo zobuchwepheshe zokuphela ezihambisana nezidingo zakho.

credibility.subtitle: Irekhodi lethu lokulandelela
credibility.title: Imiphumela, hhayi <gradient>izithembiso</gradient>
credibility.description: Ukusuka eSarajevo kuya e-Oslo, e-Amsterdam naseBerlin. Izinhlelo zebhizinisi zilethwa ngesikhathi, ngaso sonke isikhathi.

atlascopco.label: I-Cloud IAM ye-Atlas Copco
atlascopco.outcome: Yakha ingqalasizinda yokuqala ye-One Identity ye-Atlas Copco ku-Azure Kubernetes, ukunciphisa izindleko ngenkathi kugcinwa ukuhambisana kwebhizinisi.

orange.label: Ipulatifomu ye-Orange Cyberdefense
orange.outcome: Ithuthukise ingqalasizinda ye-Azure Kubernetes, amapayipi e-CI / CD, kanye nokuhlanganiswa kwe-ServiceNow ngokwezifiso yenkampani ehamba phambili ye-cybersecurity yaseYurophu.

telecom.label: I-Telecom GIS ne-AR Platform
telecom.outcome: Yakhelwe ipulatifomu ye-GIS eyenza imephu yezinsiza ezingaphansi komhlaba kulo lonke elaseJalimane ngokutholwa kokushayisana okuvimbela ukulimala kwengqalasizinda yezigidi zama-Euro.

iot.label: Ipulatifomu ye-Cloud IoT ne-Edge
iot.outcome: I-Azure IoT Hub iphatha izinkulungwane zamadivayisi, i-Synapse icubungula izigidigidi zemigqa ye-telemetry, ngokuhlanganiswa komkhawulo ukunciphisa izindleko zomyalezo nge- ~ 90%.

drone.label: Ipulatifomu ye-Drone Autonomous
drone.outcome: Isilawuli sendiza sangokwezifiso esinebhuloho le-4G-to-Azure IoT Hub elivumela izindiza ezizimele ze-BVLOS zokuqapha kwezolimo nokulethwa kwemithwalo.

payment.label: Ukutakula Uhlelo Lokukhokha
payment.outcome: Ukusindiswa kwesango lokukhokha elihlulekile lohlelo lokusebenza lweselula lwaseNorway ngokubuyisela emuva ikhodi yefa engabhaliwe. Isikhathi sokukhokha se-zero ngemuva kwesimanjemanje.

game.label: I-AAA Game Dev Tooling
game.outcome: Yakhelwe i-plugin ye-Maya enciphisa imodeli ye-3D nesikhathi sokugqwayiza ngo-50% e-studio enkulu ye-AAA, eyamukelwa njengethuluzi elijwayelekile epayipini lokukhiqiza.

social.label: Ipulatifomu yezenhlalo esekelwe endaweni
social.outcome: Uhlelo lokusebenza lokuphola olwakhiwe lwendawo yasebusuku yaseSpain ngokufanisa kwe-geolocation, imiyalezo yesikhathi sangempela, kanye nezaziso zokucindezela iklayenti lase-UK.

iga.label: Ipulatifomu ye-IGA ye-Multi-Tenant
iga.outcome: I-backend eyakhelwe isisekelo sepulatifomu yokulawula ubunikazi be-cloud-native ekhonza amaklayenti e-Fortune 500 nge-ASP.NET Core Identity ye-NoSQL esikalini sebhizinisi.

euAdjacent.title: I-EU-Adjacent, Ukulethwa Kwezwe Lomhlaba
euAdjacent.description: Amahora okusebenza e-CET anesipiliyoni esihlanganisa iNorway, iNetherlands, iJalimane, nangaphezulu.

yourEngineers.title: Onjiniyela bakho, hhayi umthengisi
yourEngineers.description: Amalungu eqembu azinikele afakwe ekuhambeni kwakho komsebenzi namathuluzi. Azikho iziphathimandla ze-akhawunti, akukho migqa yamathikithi.

hardwareToCloud.title: Hardware kuya efwini
hardwareToCloud.description: Kusuka ku-firmware yedivayisi eshumekiwe kuya kumapayipi webhizinisi le-Azure Synapse. Isofthiwe egcwele kuzo zonke izingqimba.

partners.subtitle: Isitaki sezobuchwepheshe
partners.title: <gradient>Isitaki</gradient> esihlolwe yimpi
partners.description: Asigcini nje ngokuwasebenzisa la mathuluzi - sithumele izinhlelo zokukhiqiza nazo. Kusuka ku-Microsoft Azure kuya ku-Kubernetes, onjiniyela bethu baphethe ubuchwepheshe bomhlaba wangempela.

cloudInfra.label: Ifu neNgqalasizinda
cloudInfra.description: Ukwakhiwa kwamafu amaningi nge-orchestration yesiqukathi nengqalasizinda njengekhodi.

frontend.label: I-Frontend
frontend.description: Uhlaka lwezingxenye zanamuhla olunokuphepha kohlobo kanye namathuluzi wokwakha athuthukisiwe.

backend.label: I-Backend & APIs
backend.description: Amapulatifomu weseva esezingeni lebhizinisi, izilimi zezinhlelo, kanye nama-paradigms anamuhla we-API.

data.label: Idatha & Isitoreji
data.description: Izitolo zobudlelwano, idokhumenti kanye nememori ngokusesha okugcwele.

devops.label: I-DevOps ne-Tooling
devops.description: Amapayipi e-CI / CD, ukulawulwa kwenguqulo, nokukhiqizwa konjiniyela.

cloudNative.title: Cloud-Native ngokuzenzakalelayo
cloudNative.description: Yonke iphrojekthi ifakiwe, iqhutshwa yi-CI / CD, futhi yakhiwe ngesilinganiso esivundlile kusukela osukwini lokuqala.

fullStack.title: I-Full-Stack Fluency
fullStack.description: Kusuka ku-React frontends kuya kuma-microservices we-.NET kuya kumaqoqo we-Kubernetes - iqembu elilodwa, ukuphela kuze kube sekupheleni.

productionProven.title: Ukukhiqizwa Okufakazelwe
productionProven.description: Lezi akuzona ubuchwepheshe be-demo. Ithuluzi ngalinye elisohlwini linika amandla izinhlelo zangempela ezikhonza abasebenzisi bangempela namuhla.

faq.subtitle: Isisekelo solwazi
faq.title: <gradient>Imibuzo</gradient> Ebuzwa Njalo
faq.description: Konke odinga ukukwazi mayelana nokusebenza ne-Horizon Tech

scope.question: Uyini umkhawulo womsebenzi wakho?
scope.answer: Siletha amaphrojekthi wezobuchwepheshe okuphela kokuphela: isoftware yebhizinisi yangokwezifiso, amapayipi e-AI / ML, ingqalasizinda yefu, izinhlelo ze-IoT, i-DevOps automation, nokubonisana nokuguqulwa kwedijithali. Noma ngabe udinga ipulatifomu egcwele eyakhiwe kusuka ekuqaleni noma ukuhlanganiswa okuhlosiwe nesitaki sakho esikhona, siphatha ukwakhiwa, ukuthuthukiswa, ukuhlola, nokuthunyelwa.

stack.question: Yini isitaki sakho esiyinhloko sezobuchwepheshe?
stack.answer: Isitaki sethu esiyinhloko sigxile kumapulatifomu asezingeni lebhizinisi: i-Azure ne-AWS yefu, i-.NET ne-Node.js ye-backend, i-React ne-Angular ye-frontend, i-Kubernetes ne-Docker ye-orchestration, ne-Terraform yengqalasizinda njengekhodi. Siphinde sisebenze kabanzi nePython yemisebenzi ye-AI / ML, i-Power BI ne-Fabric ye-intelligence yebhizinisi, ne-PostgreSQL, i-SQL Server, ne-MongoDB yedatha.

enterprise.question: Uyiphatha kanjani amaphrojekthi ebhizinisi?
enterprise.answer: Ukuzibandakanya ngakunye kuqala ngesigaba sokuthola ukuchaza ububanzi, ukwakhiwa, kanye nezenzakalo. Uthola iqembu elizinikele elinokuhola kwezobuchwepheshe, ukubuyekezwa okujwayelekile, nokufinyelela okuqondile konjiniyela abakha uhlelo lwakho. Silandela ama-sprints we-agile ngamademos ababambiqhaza, sigcina amabhodi ephrojekthi asobala, futhi sinikeze imibiko yenqubekela phambili yamasonto onke.

support.question: Ngabe ukusekelwa kwangemva kokwethulwa kubukeka kanjani?
support.answer: Sinikeza amazinga okusekela ahlelekile ngama-SLA achaziwe, kufaka phakathi ukuqapha kwe-24/7, impendulo yesigameko, ukulungiswa kokusebenza, kanye nokuphindaphindwa kwesici. Izivumelwano zethu zokusekela zihlanganisa ukulungiswa kwamaphutha, ama-patches ezokuphepha, ukukala kwengqalasizinda, nokuhlolwa kwezempilo okusebenzayo - okuhambisana nezidingo zakho zesikhathi sokuphumula nesikhathi sokuphendula.

integration.question: Ungakwazi yini ukuhlanganisa ingqalasizinda yethu ekhona?
integration.answer: Impela. Sigxile ekuthuthukisweni kwamafa, ukuhlanganiswa kwe-API-first, nokufuduka kwamafu e-hybrid. Noma ngabe udinga ukuxhuma ezinhlelweni ze-ERP ezisendaweni, ukuthuthela kusuka kuma-monoliths kuya kuma-microservices, noma ukuhlanganisa imininingwane yefa ngama-frontends anamuhla, sinezincwadi zokudlala zokufuduka kanye nesipiliyoni sokuhlanganiswa ukukwenza kube lula ngaphandle komthungo.

industries.question: Yiziphi izimboni osebenze kuzo?
industries.answer: Ithimba lethu lilethe amaphrojekthi kuyo yonke imikhakha ye-fintech, ukunakekelwa kwezempilo, i-logistics, i-e-commerce, amandla kanye nemikhakha kahulumeni. Siyaqonda izidingo eziqondene nomkhakha njenge-PCI-DSS yokukhokha, ukucatshangelwa kwe-HIPAA kwedatha yezempilo, ukuhambisana ne-GDPR yezimakethe ze-EU, kanye ne-telemetry yesikhathi sangempela se-IoT yezimboni.

engagement.question: Inqubo yokuzibandakanya ibukeka kanjani?
engagement.answer: Iqala ngocingo lokuthola ukuqonda imigomo yakho kanye nendawo yezobuchwepheshe. Ukusuka lapho, siletha idokhumenti yokuhlola ngezincomo zokwakha, umugqa wesikhathi, nokuqhekeka kokutshalwa kwezimali. Uma sivunyiwe, siqala neqembu elizinikezele, singene kumathuluzi akho kanye nokuhamba komsebenzi, bese siqala i-sprint yokuqala ezinsukwini ezimbalwa.

faq.ctaDescription: Ingabe unayo iphrojekthi engqondweni? Ake sixoxe ngobubanzi, umugqa wesikhathi, kanye nesabelomali.
